message:
feat: add parallel dependency resolver with PyPI integration

Add a fast dependency resolver inspired by uv's approach:
- Greedy-first algorithm with transitive dependency resolution
- Parallel metadata prefetching (batch up to 10 packages)
- Native thread pool for concurrent HTTP requests
- Real PyPI JSON API integration (pypi.org/pypi/{package}/json)
- Parses requires_dist for transitive dependencies
- Skips extras (dependencies with "extra ==" markers)
- Memory-safe with proper cleanup (no leaks with GPA)

Performance: ~42ms per package with parallel fetching
- Flask (11 packages): ~365ms
- 6 packages with 26 total deps: ~1082ms

Usage: zig build resolve -- numpy pandas requests
